findings.issue: No explicit accessible names are set for widgets
findings.fix: Add setAccessibleName() to icon-only, ambiguous, or dynamically created controls; keep visible text for normal QPushButton/QLabel controls.
Add setAccessibleDescription() for fields or buttons whose purpose is not fully clear from their visible label.

findings.issue: Form labels are not programmatically associated with inputs
findings.fix: Use QLabel.setBuddy(inputWidget) for form labels, or set accessibleName on each field.

findings.issue: No explicit tab order is declared
findings.fix: If the UI order is non-trivial, define setTabOrder() for forms and table/editing workflows.

passed_checks: Source inspected: 1 Python files and 1 Qt Designer .ui files.
Table widgets were identified and included in the desktop audit surface.
